name: Baked Parmesan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend together the bread crumbs, parsley, Parmesan cheese, salt, and garlic powder until small crumbly pieces are formed.
2. Remove any visible fat from the chicken and cut into strips.
3. Coat each piece of chicken in melted butter in a pan.
4. Dredge the chicken pieces in the crumb mixture, then lay them single layer in the remaining butter in the pan.
5. Garnish with paprika.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until tender and cooked through, about 1 hour. Baste the chicken 2 or 3 times during baking. If the chicken browns too quickly before it is fully cooked, cover with foil.
